title: Sidebar + Main Layout
description: Create a two-column layout with a fixed-width sidebar and fluid main content using calc().
hint: Set the sidebar to a fixed width and use calc(100% - sidebarWidth - gap) for main content.

title: Fluid Grid with calc()
description: Build a responsive grid where column widths are calculated using calc() with variables for column count and gap.
criteria: CSS variables for columns and gap

title: Full-Bleed Container
description: Create a full-bleed (edge-to-edge) section within a constrained container using calc() and negative margins.
hint: Use margin-left: calc(-50vw + 50%) and width: calc(100vw - (100vw - 100%) / 2) or similar.
criteria: calc() used for negative margins or width

title: Fluid Spacing System
description: Design a complete fluid spacing system where margins and paddings scale with viewport using calc() and CSS variables.
hint: Define spacing variables using calc() with viewport units, and compose them for different spacing sizes.
criteria: Spacing scale (xs, sm, md, lg, xl)
Each scale uses calc() with viewport units
